{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114195151CEA7D9C775B87F1DD0"}"},"total":1529},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7258511316141491000","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书无敌了！杨涵和魏俊希的cp太好磕了，很甜～但是我们晨儿怎么死了啊…（希望杨涵和魏俊希可以好好的，不要再出现什么意外了）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690003962,"group_id":"7199341816770989095","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"陈小孟儿爱看规则类怪谈，大家可以给我推荐～谢谢大家～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9PsgYI1/SNQRuajEXHVMl435X5/TTifwqiIgoufjGr3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b5893f1e460644e4bed9f9368c6b9954~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616801&x-signature=I5x8XMDfcs0%2BBhMJW2pY4BHYz4g%3D","user_id":"2375378237915415","user_name":"陈小孟儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2375378237915415","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7199341816770989095","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+悬疑+推理】我生活在一个普普通通的家庭，为了到别的城市长长见识，报考大学的时候我特意选了一个离家很远的学校，但就在这时诡异的事情不断发生，奇怪的校规和神秘的倒计时，隐藏在学校背后的秘密也在慢慢浮现……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/da0afe1297a0f9bada6017f9f0b4fa12","author":"柒月July","author_id":"","book_id":"7199341816770989 _count":0,"read_duration":10041,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":20352},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7396726080003900222","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我特别喜欢里面的杨涵，不知道为什么，就是好喜欢这个人物
靠我本人丰富的想象力和脑补力，在我心里他就是一个痞帅的学生会副会长，有时候有点不正经，很靠谱，有些狡诈，招牌冷笑。感觉就是那种：       一身深蓝色制服，抱着胸，挑着眉，玩味的看着你“哦~？是吗？谁说的？嗯？” 
当然，每个人物都塑造得很好，副本写的挺好，就是主角太挂了，也不是说不好，就又是破局者又王校长附身的，主角身上太多挂了吧...[思考]
（每个人都有自己喜欢的人物，每个人都有自己的想法，不喜勿喷[吃瓜]）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722187369,"group_id":"7199341816770989095","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"故事重播折叠，星星又落疲惫的肩，呼啸地铁我看过蝴蝶🦋","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Qayq4Mu8m3JHFwA+PVG613pWuuKWCPBpzRe+RUuhy7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2949f17efba24fbeb9ba7e765c80be13~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620491&x-signature=GE%2BQ96PrwxeWtbI3%2BUwhlDvVzM0%3D","user_id":"3509289961405584","user_name":"Butterfly”"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3509289961405584","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7199341816770989095","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统+悬疑+推理】我生活在一个普普通通的家庭，为了到别的城市长长见识，报考大学的时候我特意选了一个离家很远的学校，但就在这时诡异的事情不断发生，奇怪的校规和神秘的倒计时，隐藏在学校背后的秘密也在慢慢浮现……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/da0afe1297a0f9bada6017f9f0b4fa12","author":"柒月July","author_id":"","book_id":"7199341816770989095","book_name":"规则怪谈：诡异学校","book_short_name":"诡校回忆录","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则
